name: OS Map Tors
description: Tors marked on Ordnance Survey maps.
introduction: 267 tors and significant rocks represented on 1:25,000 Ordnance Survey maps: Central OL28 Dartmoor, East OL44 , West 112. Thanks to torsofdartmoor.co.uk

name: Dartmoor Compendium
introduction: 155 (1st edition) 160 (2nd) tors from Josephine M Collingwood's Dartmoor Compendium.

name: ToD Public
introduction: 625 tors and significant rocks that exist on land accessible to the Public.

name: Tors of Dartmoor Complete List
introduction: 930+ tors and significant rocks from the complete database of torsofdartmoor.co.uk.

name: Rock Idols
description: Rock Idols. A guide to Dartmoor in 28 Tors.
introduction: 28 tors From Rock Idols by Sophie Pierce and Alex Murdin.
